name: Gmail
description: Pull recent threads, important mail, and attachments from Gmail into the email domain so briefings and chats are grounded in what's actually in your inbox.
connection: Authorize once with `prevail connectors oauth gmail` (OAuth 2.0 + PKCE; the refresh token is saved to ~/.prevail/connectors/gmail/auth/refresh.token, chmod 0600). Provide your own Google OAuth app via GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID / GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET. Read-only Gmail scope.
